zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱整理
zh.content:
当前/美元价格运行在6.53附近，已跌破20日均线6.659，整体结构偏弱，短线由下跌转入低位震荡整理阶段，多头承接力度不足，趋势仍以弱势修复为主。

技术指标方面，MACD虽有微弱正值0.0039，但动能极弱且信号线缺失，说明趋势未形成有效金叉。RSI未给出，但结合价格表现判断，市场处于偏低位但未见明显反弹动能。

支撑位关注6.52短线低点，失守可能下探6.45区域；上方阻力在6.66（SMA20）及6.75一线，需有效突破才可能扭转当前弱势结构。

交易策略上建议以区间思路为主，未突破前谨慎追单。短线可在6.52附近观察企稳反弹机会，上破6.66后再考虑右侧跟随多单，严格设置止损控制风险。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD is currently in a short-term corrective phase following a mild decline, with price action drifting slightly below the 20-day simple moving average. The structure suggests weakening bullish momentum and a transition into consolidation. Recent candles show limited directional conviction, with lower highs forming near the 6.61 region. Overall trend is neutral-to-bearish in the near term, as buyers struggle to reclaim moving average support.

Indicator readings reinforce a cautious outlook. The MACD shows a marginally positive value, but the lack of a defined signal line confirmation reduces its reliability as a bullish trigger. RSI data is unavailable, limiting overbought or oversold assessment. Price behavior near session lows indicates subdued volatility and indecision, suggesting the market is balanced but slightly tilted toward sellers due to sustained trading below the SMA(20).

Key levels remain tightly defined within a narrow range. Immediate support is located at 6.52–6.53, closely aligned with the current trading floor. A sustained break below 6.50 would increase downside risk toward 6.40. On the upside, initial resistance is positioned at the SMA(20) near 6.66, followed by a stronger barrier around 6.70–6.75 where prior rejections have occurred. These zones frame the current consolidation structure.

From a trading perspective, range strategies remain most suitable under present conditions. Long positions may be considered near support with strict risk control below 6.50, targeting a mean-reversion move toward 6.66. Alternatively, a confirmed breakout above the SMA(20) would be required to validate renewed upside momentum toward 6.75. Short setups gain relevance only on a decisive breakdown supported by increased momentum and follow-through selling pressure.
